First release of the **LaserStorm Force Builder** - a single-file army list builder for the tabletop wargame **LaserStorm (2nd Edition)**.

## Getting started

Download **`laserstorm-force-builder.html`** from the assets below and open it in any modern browser. That's the whole app - no install, no server, no account. See the [User Guide](https://github.com/zntznt/laserstorm-force-builder/blob/main/docs/USER_GUIDE.md) for a full walkthrough.

## Highlights

- **Unit Builder** with live points costing - stats, Stand Traits, weapons, and the cost of every deployment type (Unit, Independent, Commander, Hero, Hero Commander) calculated as you go.
- **Factions** - five built-in factions plus your own custom ones, with colors, icons, and faction traits.
- **Unit Library** - browse, search, filter, sort, and clone every built-in and custom unit.
- **Task Forces** - rules-aware role slots (core / specialist / command / support), a Task Force Commander with tactical assets, and mechanized transports.
- **Armies & Battle Groups** - task-force or free-pick armies, organized into named battle groups with symbols.
- **Expeditionary Forces** - bundle armies into army groups for campaigns.
- **Printing** - color or grayscale reference sheets, Letter or A4, with automatic pagination.
- **Sharing & backups** - export anything from a single army to a full backup as JSON, and import what others share with you.
- **Fully offline** - fonts and icons are embedded, so it works with no network and from `file://`. Your data is saved in your browser, with undo (Ctrl/Cmd+Z) and backup reminders.

## Note

This is a list builder, not the rulebook - to play you'll need the [LaserStorm (2nd Edition)](https://www.wargamevault.com/product/476399/laserstorm-2nd-edition?affiliate_id=564654) rules.
